ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_freedom_indices" (
  "efi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EFI record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the EFI data */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall EFI score for the country */,
  "property_rights" REAL /* Score for property rights */,
  "judicial_effectiveness" REAL /* Score for judicial effectiveness */,
  "government_integrity" REAL /* Score for government integrity */,
  "tax_burden" REAL /* Score for tax burden */,
  "government_spending" REAL /* Score for government spending */,
  "fiscal_health" REAL /* Score for fiscal health */,
  "business_freedom" REAL /* Score for business freedom */,
  "labor_freedom" REAL /* Score for labor freedom */,
  "monetary_freedom" REAL /* Score for monetary freedom */,
  "trade_freedom" REAL /* Score for trade freedom */,
  "investment_freedom" REAL /* Score for investment freedom */,
  "financial_freedom" REAL /* Score for financial freedom */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Global rank of the country for the given year */,
  "score_change" REAL /* Change in overall score from the previous year */,
  "methodology_version" TEXT /* Version of the methodology used */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_freedom_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the indicator */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the indicator in the overall EFI score */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the indicator definition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source information was last updated */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical and temporal coverage of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "methodology_text" TEXT /* Detailed methodology for calculating the indicator */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the methodology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the methodology was last updated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who approved the methodology */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the methodology was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methodologies_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the EFI scores */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of historical event */,
  "sources" TEXT /* Sources of information about the event */,
  "impact_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the impact on the EFI scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic policy */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the policy on the EFI scores */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of economic policy */,
  "sources" TEXT /* Sources of information about the policy */,
  "impact_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the impact on the EFI scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "efi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EFI data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the EFI data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the EFI data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_efi_id FOREIGN KEY ("efi_id") REFERENCES economic_freedom_indices ("efi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "efi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EFI record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_efi_id FOREIGN KEY ("efi_id") REFERENCES economic_freedom_indices ("efi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "efi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EFI record the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of readme file (e.g., text, PDF) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_efi_id FOREIGN KEY ("efi_id") REFERENCES economic_freedom_indices ("efi_id")
)
